Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 
140 
SPLMTL_AFLTD_GRP 
LABEL: 
annual provider Record in Supplemental Affiliated Groups File 
DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that there is one or more record(s) in the provider Affiliated Groups supplemental 
file for this provider (linking from provider base to provider Affiliated Groups file via the 
CCW_APR_LINK_KEY). 
SHORT NAME: SPLMTL_AFLTD_GRP 
LONG NAME:
